heading: Purple Heart: limitation to members of the armed forces
label: 1131 Purple Heart: limitation to members of the armed forces
text: The decoration known as the Purple Heart (authorized to be awarded pursuant to Executive Order 11016) may only be awarded to a person who is a member of the armed forces at the time the person is killed or wounded under circumstances otherwise qualifying that person for award of the Purple Heart.
notes: References in TextExecutive Order 11016, referred to in text, is Ex. Ord. No. 11016, , 27 F.R. 4139, which is set out as a note under .Apr. 25, 1962section 1129 of this title

Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 105–85, div. A, title V, § 571(b)111 Stat. 1756Nov. 18, 1997“, United States Code, as added by subsection (a), shall apply with respect to persons who are killed or wounded after the end of the 180-day period beginning on the date of the enactment of this Act [].”Section 1131 of title 10Nov. 18, 1997
